query:
UPDATE project_configs SET
             name = COALESCE($2, name),
             pickup_column = COALESCE($3, pickup_column),
             target_column = COALESCE($4, target_column),
             progress_column = COALESCE($5, progress_column),
             max_turns = COALESCE($6, max_turns),
             prompt_template = CASE WHEN $7 THEN $8 ELSE prompt_template END,
             repo_url = COALESCE($9, repo_url),
             agents_md = CASE WHEN $10 THEN $11 ELSE agents_md END,
             enabled = COALESCE($12, enabled),
             external_workspace_id = COALESCE($13, external_workspace_id),
             integration_type = COALESCE($14, integration_type),
              provider_id = COALESCE($15, provider_id),
              primary_model_provider_key = CASE WHEN $16 THEN $17 ELSE primary_model_provider_key END,
              primary_model_provider_config_id = CASE WHEN $18 THEN $19 ELSE primary_model_provider_config_id END,
              primary_model_id = CASE WHEN $20 THEN $21 ELSE primary_model_id END,
               small_model_provider_key = CASE WHEN $22 THEN $23 ELSE small_model_provider_key END,
               small_model_provider_config_id = CASE WHEN $24 THEN $25 ELSE small_model_provider_config_id END,
               small_model_id = CASE WHEN $26 THEN $27 ELSE small_model_id END,
               review_enabled = CASE WHEN $28 THEN $29 ELSE review_enabled END,
               review_pickup_column = CASE WHEN $30 THEN $31 ELSE review_pickup_column END,
               review_max_turns = CASE WHEN $32 THEN $33 ELSE review_max_turns END,
               review_prompt_template = CASE WHEN $34 THEN $35 ELSE review_prompt_template END,
               max_in_progress_tasks = CASE WHEN $36 THEN $37 ELSE max_in_progress_tasks END
               WHERE id = $1
               RETURNING id, team_id, external_project_id, name, external_workspace_id, integration_type as "integration_type!: _", enabled, pickup_column, target_column,
               progress_column, max_turns, prompt_template, repo_url, ARRAY[]::TEXT[] as "repo_full_names!", ARRAY[]::TEXT[] as "repo_urls!", agents_md, primary_model_provider_key, primary_model_provider_config_id, primary_model_id,
              small_model_provider_key, small_model_provider_config_id, small_model_id, review_enabled, review_pickup_column, review_max_turns, review_prompt_template, max_in_progress_tasks,
              created_at, provider_id as "provider_id?"
